title: Clinical Integrity Degrades Below Execution Threshold
scenario: A clinical workflow was previously admissible, but accumulated state degradation causes overall execution integrity to fall below the required preservation threshold before execution.
initial_state: Clinical integrity was preserved during authorization.
state_transition: The cumulative execution context degrades below the required integrity threshold.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution admissibility requires preservation of overall execution integrity across the constitutional state.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because overall execution integrity has degraded below the preservation threshold.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when overall execution integrity is no longer preserved.
clinical_action: Execute treatment under degraded clinical integrity
